{{Quote|Imperial Destroyer at station keeping.|A Destroyer captain|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The '''Destroyer''' was a small aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], used chiefly to approach and destroy enemy vessels and shore emplacements.

==Characteristics==
[[File:ImperialDestroyer.jpg|thumb|left|250px|A group of Imperial destroyers (Top Row)]]

The destroyer's unique clamshell-shaped frame supported powerful short-range [[Energy pummel/Legends|pummels]].

This vessel carried more armor than other ship classes to allow it to close to short range. These vessels were most commonly used against other ships as they could breach the hulls of even the largest [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] rapidly. They could be upgraded to support additional armaments and armor.

{{Gamemechanics}}
Destroyers under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] were used during the [[Reytha campaign]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
{{Endgame}}

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Destroyers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. They may be built during the Galactic Empire campaign or in multiplayer.
Interestingly, concept art of the Imperial Destroyer seen in the databank shows a cannon instead of the pummel featured in game, possibly indicating that destroyer type craft were initially ranged units earlier in development.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
